entry_conditions: oi_delta_5m and oi_delta_15m show sustained build
spread_bps and slippage_bps stay below cost gate limits
exit_logic: cost-aware stop when spread or slippage expands
invalidation_conditions: oi build fails to produce price continuation
spread expands beyond expected net edge
BTC or ETH regime flips risk-off
market_hypothesis: When open interest builds with confirmed price breakout and acceptable execution cost, forced continuation flow may persist long enough to overcome fee, spread, slippage, and funding.
who_loses_money: late breakout participants and forced hedgers who cross the spread after confirmation
